task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Cadillac Escalade (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $88100.00 and wholesale is $65516.00. Product features: Luxury full-size SUV with Super Cruise hands-free driving and OLED displays. Reference: https://www.cadillac.com/suvs/escalade

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Cadillac Escalade. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Cadillac Escalade. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
